name: @local/google-workspace
description: Configure which Google Calendar, Gmail, and Google Drive tools the agent can use.

integrations.reason: Reads your calendar, creates calendar events, reads your emails, composes email drafts, and reads files from your Google Drive.

tools.name: list_calendar_events
tools.description: List upcoming events from a Google Calendar. Defaults to the primary calendar, max 10 results, ordered by start time. Pass timeMin/timeMax (ISO 8601) to scope to a date range. You can target a specific connected account with `connection`.

connection.description: Connection id of the Google account to use. Omit to use the default / first enabled account.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of events to return. Defaults to 10.

timeMin.description: ISO 8601 datetime — lower bound for event start time (inclusive).

timeMax.description: ISO 8601 datetime — upper bound for event start time (exclusive).

q.description: Free-text search query to filter events by title, description, location, or attendees.

events.description: Array of Google Calendar event objects.

tools.name: get_calendar_event
tools.description: Get a single Google Calendar event by its ID. You can target a specific connected account with `connection`.

connection.description: Connection id of the Google account to use. Omit to use the default / first enabled account.

tools.name: create_calendar_event
tools.description: Create a new event on a Google Calendar. Requires summary, start, and end. You can target a specific connected account with `connection`.

connection.description: Connection id of the Google account to use. Omit to use the default / first enabled account.

start.description: Start time. Use { dateTime, timeZone } for timed events or { date } for all-day events.

date.description: ISO 8601 date for all-day events, e.g. '2026-07-09'.

end.description: End time. Use { dateTime, timeZone } for timed events or { date } for all-day events.

date.description: ISO 8601 date for all-day events, e.g. '2026-07-09'.

event.description: The created Google Calendar event object.

tools.name: list_emails
tools.description: List Gmail messages with optional search query and label filters. You can target a specific connected account with `connection`.

connection.description: Connection id of the Google account to use. Omit to use the default / first enabled account.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of messages to return. Defaults to 10.

tools.name: get_email
tools.description: Retrieve the full content of a Gmail message by ID. You can target a specific connected account with `connection`.

connection.description: Connection id of the Google account to use. Omit to use the default / first enabled account.

message.description: The full Gmail message object including headers, body text, and HTML.

tools.name: compose_draft
tools.description: Compose a Gmail draft without sending it. You can target a specific connected account with `connection`.

connection.description: Connection id of the Google account to use. Omit to use the default / first enabled account.

tools.name: list_drive_files
tools.description: List or search files in Google Drive. You can target a specific connected account with `connection`.

connection.description: Connection id of the Google account to use. Omit to use the default / first enabled account.

pageSize.description: Maximum number of files to return (max 100). Defaults to 10.

q.description: Google Drive query string, e.g. "name contains 'budget'".

pageToken.description: Page token from a previous list_drive_files result for pagination.

files.description: Array of Google Drive file metadata objects.

tools.name: stat_drive_file
tools.description: Get metadata for a single Google Drive file by its ID. You can target a specific connected account with `connection`.

connection.description: Connection id of the Google account to use. Omit to use the default / first enabled account.

file.description: The Google Drive file metadata object.

tools.name: read_drive_file
tools.description: Read the content of a Google Drive file. You can target a specific connected account with `connection`.

connection.description: Connection id of the Google account to use. Omit to use the default / first enabled account.

mimeType.description: Override the export format for Google Workspace files.

outputSchema.description: Returns a content shape with image-data, file-data, or text parts depending on the file type.
